scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/types && concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.dev:fast: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/web
